caption: A man with blond hair, wearing a navy blue shirt and a white headset, is shown in a small picture-in-picture window over a video game menu. He is sitting in a room with a Christmas tree visible behind him. The game interface features the word "LINEUP" in the top left and a top navigation bar with options including "OFFENSE," "DEFENSE," "SPECIAL TEAMS," "SPECIALISTS," "STRATEGY," and "VISUALS." Numerical values such as "173,037," "14,609," and "2,343,543" are visible at the top right, along with "LV 19" and "(90)". At the bottom of the screen, prompts for "BEST LINEUP," "HELP," and "BACK" are displayed next to button icons. As the sequence progresses, the man's expression changes from a neutral look to a wide-eyed, surprised expression with his mouth open, while the game menu remains static.
